CompressFlow

GitHub

Compression Suite

Ship lighter images instantly.

A focused compression workflow for PNG and JPEG with clear savings, fast processing, and clean downloads.

1. Drop Files

Add PNG or JPEG images in one batch.

2. Compress

Serverless compression runs in seconds.

3. Download

See your savings and download instantly.

Drag and drop images here

Up to 20 images, 4MB each, PNG and JPEG only

    Built by Varun.
